---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## User story

(In the form: "a person who … wants to … so that …")

## Why now

(What changed that makes this worth doing? A new use case, a
recurring frustration, an external requirement?)

## Proposed shape

(High level — sketch the behaviour, not the implementation.)

## Alternatives considered

(What else did you think about and rule out, and why?)

## Fit with existing roadmap

(Does this fit in current P##/FP## items, or does it need a new
phase? If unsure, that's fine — say so.)

## Out of scope

(Things this issue is explicitly NOT proposing.)
